Interface Service

All Known Subinterfaces:
ByteCodeInfo, ClassFileRepository, ConstantEvaluator, CrossReferenceSourceInfo, ImplicitElementInfo, NameInfo, ProgramFactory, ProgramModelInfo, SourceFileRepository, SourceInfo
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractService, ChangeHistory, DefaultByteCodeInfo, DefaultClassFileRepository, DefaultConstantEvaluator, DefaultCrossReferenceSourceInfo, DefaultImplicitElementInfo, DefaultNameInfo, DefaultProgramModelInfo, DefaultSourceFileRepository, DefaultSourceInfo, JavaProgramFactory, KeYCrossReferenceNameInfo, KeYCrossReferenceSourceFileRepository, KeYCrossReferenceSourceInfo, ProjectSettings, ProofJavaProgramFactory, SchemaCrossReferenceSourceInfo, SchemaJavaProgramFactory
public interface Service
Primary RECODER service interface.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ServiceConfiguration
    getServiceConfiguration()
    Returns the service configuration this service is a part of.
    void
    initialize(ServiceConfiguration cfg)
    Called by the service configuration indicating that all services are known.

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      void initialize(ServiceConfiguration cfg)
      Called by the service configuration indicating that all services are known. Services may now start communicating or linking among their configuration partners. The service configuration can be memorized if it has not been passed in by a constructor already.
      Parameters:
      cfg - the service configuration this services has been assigned to.

    • getServiceConfiguration

      ServiceConfiguration getServiceConfiguration()
      Returns the service configuration this service is a part of.
      Returns:
      the configuration of this service.
